serverInfo.name: lessmanual-website-mcp
serverInfo.description: MCP stub for LessManual website. WebMCP tools live in-page at /v2. Standalone MCP server planned Q3 2026.

transport.note: In-page WebMCP via navigator.modelContext.provideContext(). Not a streamable HTTP MCP server yet.

x-roadmap: Standalone MCP server (streamable HTTP) planned 2026-Q3 with OAuth 2.0 protected resource.
